meaning: n.代用品,代替者,替代品v.代替,替换,替代
examples: He was brought on as (a) substitute after half-time.
Jefferson entered as a substitute in the 60th minute.
Reduced-calorie cheese is a great substitute for cream cheese.
Now back at The Hawthorns, he was a substitute in the Baggies' FA Cup defeat by Reading.
At the other end Ishmael Miller shot over and substitute Filipe Teixeira wasted a superb late chance.
